mapper.select: SELECT id, reader_no, username, password, student_no, name, gender, college, major, class_name, department, phone, email, avatar, status, create_time, update_time FROM reader WHERE status = 1 AND ( username = #{username} OR reader_no = #{username} OR student_no = #{username} ) AND ( password = #{password} OR password = MD5(#{password}) OR password = LOWER(MD5(#{password})) OR password = UPPER(MD5(#{password})) ) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, reader_no, username, password, student_no, name, gender, college, major, class_name, department, phone, email, avatar, status, create_time, update_time FROM reader WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, reader_no, username, password, student_no, name, gender, college, major, class_name, department, phone, email, avatar, status, create_time, update_time FROM reader WHERE reader_no = #{readerNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, reader_no, username, password, student_no, name, gender, college, major, class_name, department, phone, email, avatar, status, create_time, update_time FROM reader
status = 1
AND ( reader_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR college LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reader( reader_no, username, password, student_no, name, gender, college, major, class_name, department, phone, email, avatar, status, create_time ) VALUES( #{readerNo}, #{username}, #{password}, #{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{college}, #{major}, #{className}, #{department}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, 1, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE reader SET reader_no = #{readerNo}, username = #{username}, student_no = #{studentNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, college = #{college}, major = #{major}, class_name = #{className}, department = #{department}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reader WHERE status = 1
